task: I found a wallet left behind in a hotel room and I want to handle it the right way without overcomplicating it. Can you help me draft a simple note for the front desk and a quick checklist for what to do next?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a simple, plain version you can use.

Front desk note:
Wallet found in room [room number].
It was left behind after checkout/cleaning.
Wallet appears to contain [cash/cards/ID if known].
It has been turned in to [front desk/lost and found/manager].
Guest was [not aware / aware if you spoke with them].

Quick checklist:
- Pick up wallet with gloves or a tissue if needed
- Do not go through it more than necessary
- Check room number and note where it was found
- Write down what it is and any obvious contents
- Turn it in to front desk or lost and found right away
- Let the manager know if your hotel requires that
- If the guest is still around and allowed by policy, notify front desk only
- Make sure your note is clear and simple

If you want, I can also make this into a super short one-line handoff note you can copy fast.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, that’s close enough. I’d want it a little more plain, and I wouldn’t put in more than I have to.

Maybe like:

Front desk note:
Found wallet in room [number] during cleaning.
Turned in to front desk / lost and found at [time].
Contents not fully checked.

Checklist:
- Pick it up carefully
- Note the room number
- Don’t dig through it
- Turn it in right away
- Write down time and where it was found

If you want, make me a real short version too, like one line for the log. That’s usually enough.

turns.agent_response:
Yep — that works. Here’s a plain version you can use:

**Front desk note:**  
Wallet found in room [number] during cleaning.  
Turned in to front desk/lost and found at [time].  
Contents not fully checked.

**Checklist:**  
- Pick it up carefully  
- Note the room number  
- Don’t dig through it  
- Turn it in right away  
- Write down the time and where it was found  

**One-line log version:**  
Wallet found in room [number] and turned in at [time].

If you want, I can also make it even shorter for a quick handwritten note.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, that’s fine. Plain enough.

The one-line log version is what I’d use most of the time:
Wallet found in room [number] and turned in at [time].

That’s about all you need.
